overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit covered pedestrian walkway at night during light rain. The player observes digital billboards and palm trees before looking up at the ceiling and approaching an elevated overlook with NPCs overlooking a busy city street below.

large rectangular concrete planters containing tall palm trees lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk through a futuristic covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by cyan neon lights outlining doorways. Palm trees in concrete planters line the right side while digital billboards glow on the left. A single NPC sits on a bench as the camera moves forward through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceiling view of glass and metal structure with falling rain

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the ceiling structure, glass panels, and falling rain

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to observe the glass ceiling panels, neon light strips, and rain falling from the night sky above

entered.detail: transparent ceiling panels showing the dark night sky and rain above
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows visible through the ceiling
raindrops falling through the ceiling structure creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the ceiling structure composed of glass panels and neon light strips. Rain falls through the transparent roof while a towering skyscraper looms overhead against the night sky. The surrounding walkway elements move out of view as the perspective shifts to vertical observation.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian overlook with glass railing above city street

events.description: arrives at the elevated overlook area with glass railing and view of street traffic below

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass railing to observe the street traffic below, passing by NPCs gathered at the overlook

notable_agents.action: woman in futuristic revealing outfit with blue hair standing near the railing
man leaning over glass railing looking down at the traffic below

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier with metal posts separating walkway from drop to street below
multi-lane wet city street visible through the glass railing with reflections
cars with headlights driving on the wet street below the overlook
illuminated advertisements and signage on buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward an elevated overlook area where NPCs gather by a glass safety railing. A woman in futuristic attire stands near the railing while a man leans over to watch the traffic on the wet street below. Neon signs from across the street illuminate the scene as cars pass by on the multi-lane road visible through the transparent barrier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a neon-lit pedestrian corridor that transitions from a ground-level walk to an elevated urban overlook. It begins with a steady progression through a futuristic walkway, passing cyan-outlined doorways, palm trees in concrete planters, and glowing digital billboards. As the camera tilts upward, the perspective shifts from the corridor to the glass ceiling and neon light strips above, revealing rain falling through the panels and a towering skyscraper looming against the night sky. The scene then opens up as the camera moves toward a glass safety railing where NPCs gather, shifting the focus from the interior architecture to the bustling city outside. Finally, the view expands over the transparent barrier to reveal a wet, multi-lane street illuminated by distant neon signs as cars pass below.
